content.speakerText: You're all set! Have a great day exploring the city!
content.speakerTextCn: 一切搞定啦！祝你在城市里玩得开心！
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much! You’ve been really helpful!
Thanks! I’ll find my way now. Have a nice day too!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢和道别
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合日常英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thank', 'helpful', 'bye' 或类似表达

content.speakerText: I'm glad I could help you find the bus stop!
content.speakerTextCn: 很高兴能帮你找到公交站！
expectedAnswers: Thank you so much! You made my day easier!
Really appreciate it! Have a great afternoon!
Thanks a lot! I wouldn't have found it without you!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚回应对方的帮助并表达感谢
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的动词和短语（如 appreciate, made my day）
表达自然度：语气是否亲切、非机械式回答
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'thank', 'appreciate', 'help' 等核心词汇
